title: goldmanella
intro: Goldmanella, also known as Plectranthus fruticosus, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used traditionally in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Goldmanella has been reported to possess several health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating various respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other minor health issues.
